creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 145919
patch for updating port

- Update to 1.41
- Decouple RUN_DEPENDS from BUILD_DEPENDS
- Add TEST_DEPENDS
- Remove outdated dialog

Tested on FreeBSD-10.0-amd64 (log attached) with:
poudriere testport -j 10-amd64 -o devel/p5-Workflow > p5-Workflow.log
